segments.text: Welcome to I I C R C compliance.
Standards. RestoreAssist embeds S500 for water damage, S520 for mould remediation, and S550 for fire and smoke.
Checklists. Digital compliance checklists are pre-loaded for every job type, auto-checking completion and flagging missing items.
Audit trail. Full traceability with timestamps, digital signatures, and a complete document log — ready whenever assessors or insurers ask.
